title: Windows Profile canonical launcher doctrine
mission: Install the canonical ownership and enforcement contract for one idempotent Windows Profile open-or-activate launcher owned by AgentSwitchboard and consumed and certified by SysAdminSuite, while reserving separate Linux and Android profiles.

owner.surface: device profile launcher doctrine and enforcement

safeParallelWork: Review of PR #36 without branch mutation
AgentSwitchboard provider routing outside device-profile doctrine paths
SysAdminSuite work that does not modify workstation launcher ownership surfaces
ownedScope: Windows Linux and Android profile registry and ownership doctrine
AgentSwitchboard canonical ownership and SysAdminSuite consumer-certifier role
raw WezTerm and competing launcher prohibition
focused validators fixtures and cross-platform CI
public plan and pull-request proof metadata
forbiddenScope: canonical launcher implementation or installed runtime mutation
WezTerm WSL tmux AgentSwitchboard or SysAdminSuite execution
SysAdminSuite repository mutation or certification delivery
network provider target account save customer-data or deployment mutation
secrets private evidence generated runtime junk force-push destructive cleanup default-branch mutation merge or release

tasks.title: Define canonical device profile ownership
inputs: Current AgentSwitchboard and SysAdminSuite launcher evidence
acceptanceCriteria: Windows Linux and Android profiles are distinct
AgentSwitchboard is the only canonical launcher owner
SysAdminSuite is a delegate and certifier
Raw frontend fallback and competing lifecycle logic are forbidden
evidence: Tracked doctrine policy registry and schema on feat/windows-profile-launcher-doctrine

tasks.title: Install profile ownership enforcement
acceptanceCriteria: Architecture-only profile action claims are rejected
Aggregate app observer runs the profile validator
Contract-only status prevents false runtime claims
evidence: Tracked validators fixtures workflow authority wiring and graph nodes

tasks.title: Validate exact delivery head
acceptanceCriteria: Harness doctrine and instruction validators pass
Aggregate app harness passes without runtime execution

validation: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -File ./scripts/Test-AppHarness.ps1 with output outside the checkout
final branch commit changed-file and pull-request review

proof.target: Canonical device profile ownership, Windows open-or-activate contract, SysAdminSuite delegation rules, action-commitment enforcement, and exact-head cross-platform validation
proof.achieved: Tracked doctrine policy registry fixtures validators workflow authority wiring and child templates are present; exact-head CI is pending.
proof.ceiling: No canonical launcher implementation, installed launcher, WezTerm process, workspace opening or activation, duplicate-prevention runtime, SysAdminSuite certification, Linux profile, Android profile, deployment, or device acceptance is proven.

notes: Open a stacked pull request against feat/runtime-event-contract-doctrine.
Bind this plan to the actual pull request after creation.
After doctrine lands, implement the canonical launcher in a separate AgentSwitchboard PR.
After implementation proof, adopt and certify it in a separate SysAdminSuite PR that removes all independent fallback logic.
